news.title: IMF Executive Board Approves 48-month US$20 billion Extended Arrangement for Argentina
news.summary: The IMF approved a new Extended Fund Facility for Argentina, setting out macroeconomic policy priorities and disbursement terms.

analysis.summary: Argentina shows very weak economic momentum with GDP growth at -1.3%. Inflation remains elevated at 219.9%. Unemployment stands at 7.1%. Overall signals for the short-term outlook are mixed.
